lines.speaker: Petrus
lines.text: Oh, hello! Have you come to see the minotaurs? No one ever comes to see the minotaurs, but they love having guests!

lines.speaker: Petrus
lines.text: Of course! Most people are scared of them. It's sad in a way. They're such misunderstood creatures, but they're massive softies once you get to know them!

lines.speaker: Petrus
lines.text: You'll find them down in the cave if you want to say hello! They'll be thrilled to see you!

lines.speaker: Petrus
lines.text: Oh, hello again! Have you been spending time with the minotaurs? They always love it when people come to visit! Such wonderful creatures...
